Enabled.Name: Enable Manual Fog Control
Enabled.Hint: When enabled, token movement no longer reveals fog. Use the Fog Weaver tools to reveal and hide areas manually.

LineWidth.Name: Line Tool Width
LineWidth.Hint: The width in pixels of the line shape when using the Reveal-Line or Hide-Line tools.

GmFogAlpha.Name: GM Fog Preview Opacity
GmFogAlpha.Hint: While the Fog Weaver tool is active, fog of war is shown to the GM at this opacity. Lower values let you see the map more clearly through unrevealed areas.

GmFogTint.Name: GM Fog Tint Color
GmFogTint.Hint: The color of unexplored fog areas shown to the GM while the Fog Weaver tool is active.

IsolateStates.Name: Preserve Independent Fog States
IsolateStates.Hint: When enabled, toggling Fog Weaver preserves each mode's fog state independently — GM-painted fog and token-vision exploration never overlap. Disable to revert to the previous shared-state behavior.

SnapshotSizeWarning.Name: Snapshot Size Warning Threshold (KB)
SnapshotSizeWarning.Hint: Show a warning when a fog snapshot saved during a toggle exceeds this size in kilobytes. Raise or lower this to tune when the alert appears.

Controls.Title: Fog Weaver
Controls.ResetFogContent: This will erase all revealed and hidden areas and clear the drawing history. This cannot be undone.

Warnings.SnapshotLarge: Fog Weaver: the {type} fog snapshot is {size} KB, which exceeds the {threshold} KB warning threshold. Consider resetting fog if it has grown unexpectedly large.
